title: Anbulla Mannavane Lyrics Mettukudi
stanzas:
Anbulla Mannavane Lyrics Mettukudi

Anbulla mannavane
aasai kathalaney(2)
idhayam puriyaatha
en mugavari theriyaathaa

kiliye kiliye po
thalaivanai thaedi po
mullil thoongugiren
kanavai allippo

thanimaiyil kanneerai
kangalil yaendhi po

Anbulla mannavane
aasai kathalaney(2)
idhayam puriyaatha
en mugavari theriyaathaa

vaa vaa kannaa endre
kenji kaetka po po po
vaasal paarthu vaadum
vazhvai sollu po po

ilamai urugum thunbam
indre solla po po.
nithamum idhayam yaengum
nilamai solla po po
kiliye kiliye po po

kathal ullathile
maatram sollu po
meendum mannippu
kaetukolla po

nadanthathai marandhida sol
uravinil kalanthida sol
madiyinil urangida sol
kangal thaeduthu 
thirumugam kaana

Anbulla mannavane
aasai kathalaney
idhayam puriyaatha
en mugavari theriyaathaa

vendhen endru koora
vanna kiliye po po po
vaasamalli poovai
sootta sollu po po

idhayam inaiyum neram
thanimai vendum po po
undhan kangal paarthaal
vetkam koodum po po
kiliye kiliye po po

niththam pala nooru

muththam kaetka po
saththam illaamal
jannal saaththi po

vizhigalil amudha mazhai
ini oru pirivu illai
uravugal mudivathillai
Gangai vanthadhu nenjinil
paaya. 

Anbulla mannavane
aasai kathalaney(2)
idhayam puriyaatha
en mugavari theriyaathaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Anbulla Mannavane?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does Anbulla Mannavane appear?

This song is featured in the movie Mettukudi.

Who is the singer of Anbulla Mannavane?

The song is sung by the talented Swarnalatha.

When was Anbulla Mannavane released?

The song was released on August 29, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Anbulla Mannavane, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, yearning for her presence. The song's soothing melody and romantic lyrics create a dreamy atmosphere, making it a perfect backdrop for love stories. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. This classic track remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbulla Mannavane is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the soulful voice of Swarnalatha. This enchanting track from the movie Mettukudi resonates with nostalgia, making it a perfect listen for romantic moments. Experience the magic of this classic song that continues to touch hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: Beloved Lord, my heart is restless and does not know the way. I search for the leader, while I sleep in the thorns of loneliness. I see dreams and tears in my eyes.
